name: Almond Butter Christmas Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour once and measure it. Add baking powder and salt to the flour and sift together three times.
2. Cream butter thoroughly. Gradually add sugar and cream until light and fluffy.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating thoroughly after each addition.
4. Add chopped almonds and raisins and beat well.
5. Add flour alternately with milk, a small amount at a time, beating after each addition until smooth. Add vanilla.
6. Bake in two greased 9-inch layer pans in a moderate oven (375 degrees F.) for 25 minutes, or until done.
7. Spread Boiled Frosting between layers and on top and sides of cake.
8. Decorate the top of the cake with a wreath of holly using pieces of maraschino cherries or red cinnamon candies for berries, and slices of angelica or citron for leaves and stems. Alternatively, decorate with poinsettias made of candied cherries. Slice cherries in rings, cut the rings in half, and arrange to form petals of poinsettias. If desired, Lemon Butter Frosting may be used.
